task_updates.executor_notes: Added `ParameterType`, `ParameterOption`, `ParameterDefinition`, and `ParameterSchema` in `src/tools/video-editor/types/index.ts`. Extended `ClipEntrance`, `ClipExit`, and `ClipContinuous` with optional `params?: Record<string, unknown>`. Verified `ClipMeta` needs no direct change because it already inherits `entrance`, `exit`, and `continuous` from `TimelineClip` via indexed access in `src/tools/video-editor/lib/timeline-data.ts:44-47`. Repo type check passed.

Extended exported `EffectComponentProps` in `src/tools/video-editor/effects/entrances.tsx` with `params?: Record<string, unknown>`. Existing built-in entrance/exit/continuous effects were left unchanged and remained type-safe because the new prop is optional. Repo type check passed.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. `ClipEntrance`, `ClipExit`, and `ClipContinuous` all now include optional `params?: Record<string, unknown>` in `src/tools/video-editor/types/index.ts`, and `ClipMeta` inherits them transitively through `TimelineClip['entrance'|'exit'|'continuous']` without requiring modification.

Yes. `EffectComponentProps` remains exported from `src/tools/video-editor/effects/entrances.tsx` and now includes `params?: Record<string, unknown>`. Existing effect components were unaffected, and `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false` completed with zero errors.
